entry.title: ASML reports €9.3 billion total net sales and €2.9 billion net income in Q2 2026
entry.summary: ASML increases outlook, expects 2026 total net sales to be between €43 billion and €45 billion, with a gross margin between 54% and 56%

entry.title: TSMC Reports Second Quarter EPS of NT$27.25|Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited
entry.summary: HSINCHU, Taiwan, R.O.C., Jul. 16, 2026 -- TSMC (TWSE: 2330, NYSE: TSM) today announced consolidated revenue of NT$1,270.38 billion, net income of NT$706.56 billion, and diluted

entry.title: TSMC June 2026 Revenue Report|Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited
entry.summary: HSINCHU, Taiwan, R.O.C. – July 13, 2026 - TSMC (TWSE: 2330, NYSE: TSM) today announced its net revenue for June 2026: On a consolidated basis, revenue for June 2026 was

entry.title: Lam Research Corporation Announces June Quarter Financial Conference Call
entry.summary: Lam Research Corp. (NASDAQ: LRCX) today announced that the company will host its quarterly financial conference call and webcast on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, beginning at 2:00 p.m. Pacific...

entry.title: Lam Research Corporation Declares Quarterly Dividend
entry.summary: Lam Research Corporation (Nasdaq: LRCX) today announced that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.26 per share of common stock. The dividend payment will be made on July...

entry.title: Arm announces earnings release date for first quarter fiscal year ended 2027
entry.summary: Arm (NASDAQ:ARM) will report financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2027 on Wednesday, July 29, 2026, after market close.
